title: Melinis reynaudioides
taxonomy: Melinis reynaudioides is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is native to Madagascar and belongs to the genus Melinis, which includes several species of grasses. The genus Melinis is part of the subfamily Chloridoideae, which is a large and diverse group of grasses found in various parts of the world. The subfamily Chloridoideae is further classified under the family Poaceae, also known as the true grasses. Melinis reynaudioides is a unique species within this classification, with distinct characteristics and adaptations that allow it to thrive in its native habitat.
